description: Protection rules for high-value or high-difficulty tests. Audit tooling must treat these as do-not-delete unless a human explicitly overrides the policy.

protected_globs.reason: Browser E2E tests are high-difficulty and high-value coverage.
Behavior suites cover multi-actor and cross-module regressions.
Concurrency tests cover queueing and convergence risks.
Stress scenarios cover timing and throughput risks.
Seed/bootstrap tests protect E2E reset and startup assumptions.
Roster and batch-class workflows are broad and historically fragile.
Homework plus LLM grading flows sit on a central product path.
